words.def: moderate in type or degree or effect or force; far from extreme
words.zh: a. 溫和的, 溫柔的, 淡味的, 適度的, 輕微的, (肥皂等)軟性的

words.def: either of two folds of skin that can be moved to cover or open the eye
words.zh: n. 蓋子, 限制, 眼瞼

words.def: a Cypriot monetary unit equal to one thousandth of a pound
used in combination to denote the middle
words.zh: a. 中間的, 中央的, 中部的
